race.name: Rothenthurmer Volksskilauf
race.tagline: Swiss Loppet racing through the protected Rothenthurm moorland — a compact freestyle marathon in one of Switzerland's most scenic Nordic venues.

climate.description: Moorland setting at 850m. Temperatures typically -5°C to 2°C in January. Snow reliability moderate at this altitude.
challenges: Moorland terrain can be exposed to wind

course.primary: Loop course through the Rothenthurm moor landscape, a protected natural area. Flat to gently rolling moorland terrain.
features: Part of the Swiss Loppet series

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A compact Swiss Loppet race with nice moorland setting but limited field and moderate altitude.

history.summary: Part of the Swiss Loppet series, the Rothenthurmer Volksskilauf takes place through the protected Rothenthurm moor landscape in central Switzerland. The moor was preserved by a historic 1987 referendum.
notable_facts: Set in the Rothenthurm moor, protected since a 1987 Swiss referendum
Part of the Swiss Loppet series
One of central Switzerland's most scenic Nordic venues

videos.title: Rothenthurmer Volksskilauf 2019
videos.description: Bei idealen Witterungs- und perfekten Loipenverhältnissen absolvierten 434 Läuferinnen und Läufer den 51. Rothenthurmer Volksskilauf. 71 Kinder und Jugendliche massen sich am Nachmittag und zeigten sehr spannende und faire Wettkämpfe. Ein herzlicher Dank geht an alle Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmer, Sponsoren, Unterstützer und Helfer.
videos.curation_reason: Official race coverage of the Rothenthurmer Volksskilauf showing race conditions and participant atmosphere.
